text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fall Tenno Sho is here. The atmosphere at the
racecourse is abuzz with anticipation for Air
Groove and Silenve Suzuka's rematch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two exchange a few quiet words. Air Groove
has set her resolve, and Silence Suzuka is excited
to race against this renewed Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Empress—as the challenger who
guides all Umamusume and as my personal
ideal—steps up to take on the fall Tenno Sho.
